title: Enterprise Growth & Scaling Resource Guide
subtitle: Government platforms, working-capital infrastructure and growth programmes for established MSMEs in India
sourceNote: Structured from the uploaded Enterprise Growth & Scaling Resource Guide. Programme terms, eligibility, fees and availability can change; confirm all details on the linked official portal.

resources.name: myScheme Portal
resources.summary: Cross-ministry scheme discovery using an adaptive eligibility questionnaire.
resources.bestFor: Discovering schemes and checking preliminary eligibility

resources.name: JanSamarth Portal
resources.summary: Digital gateway for credit-linked government schemes and participating lenders.
requirements: Audited financials, projections and project report when requested
resources.bestFor: Exploring eligible credit-linked schemes and beginning a digital application

resources.name: MSME Champions Portal
resources.summary: Institutional support, grievance resolution and MSME modernization assistance.
resources.bestFor: Support requests, payment issues and modernization guidance

resources.name: RXIL
resources.summary: Invoice discounting marketplace intended to unlock receivables from approved buyers.
resources.bestFor: Converting accepted invoices into earlier working capital

resources.name: M1xchange
resources.summary: Digital invoice-discounting platform connecting MSME sellers, buyers and financiers.
resources.bestFor: Competitive financing against approved trade receivables

resources.name: FaMe TN
resources.summary: Tamil Nadu MSME support agency covering competitiveness, modernization, marketing and related programmes.
resources.bestFor: Tamil Nadu MSME incentives, market access and RAMP-related support

resources.name: TIIC
resources.summary: State financial institution offering project and modernization finance subject to scheme terms.
requirements: Project cost, financial and security documents

resources.name: Tamil Nadu Single Window Portal
resources.summary: Integrated interface for state industrial clearances and approvals.
requirements: Land, building, environmental, power and water information as applicable
resources.bestFor: Coordinating expansion approvals across state departments

resources.name: Wadhwani Foundation
resources.summary: Business-growth programmes and structured acceleration support for eligible enterprises.
resources.bestFor: Mentoring, execution discipline and structured growth planning

resources.name: CII MSME
resources.summary: Industry networking, capability development and supplier-connect ecosystem for MSMEs.
resources.bestFor: Corporate connections, supplier development and industry learning

plan.title: Diagnose eligibility and cash-flow bottlenecks
actions: Complete Udyam, PAN, GST and promoter-profile checks
Run scheme discovery through myScheme and JanSamarth
Evaluate RXIL or M1xchange for eligible receivables

plan.title: Prepare expansion finance and approvals
actions: Build a project report, financial projections and document pack
Review FaMe TN and TIIC support
Map required approvals through the Tamil Nadu Single Window Portal

plan.title: Build the growth engine
actions: Apply to a suitable growth or mentoring programme
Prepare a strong corporate capability statement
Pursue supplier, export and institutional-buyer opportunities
